review_title: Kinsta is one of my favourite partner for WordPress Managed Hosting
description: My company provides ecommerce as a Service. Before Kinsta, we had to manage the infrastructure all by ourselves. This is costly and very specific, so we choose to move to Kinsta and we never regret it. Kinsta took all our pain and helped us to grow from 20 sites to over 50 with ease.
author: Daniel K.
pros: Kinsta provides excellent support. This is my preferred feature. They also provide it in spanish, wich is very important for my not-so-fluent english staff. Beside support, they have a very solid infrastructre, and they know WordPress very well.
cons: PHP Workers are my main cause of troubles, specifically my site's shortage of them. I would love to add more php workers on demand easily.

description: I believe Kinsta team is doing a great work overall.
author: Jose J G.
pros: Kinsta gives a great management system for our WordPress sites, allowing us to focus on creating content and forgetting about backend issues. Great documentation on Kinsta help section.
cons: I think that the only con for certain users is the price. Maybe the price is a little bit high compared to similar platforms. Aside from that, everything is great so far.

author: Lukas S.
pros: Easy, sleek design of the GUI, useful staging feature
cons: The user support isn't worth the name. Standard responses, permanent handovers, basic excuses, no in depth analysis.

description: It provides a very strong service and excellent performance, but the high price is an important factor in the customer's decision to use its services
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: • It relies on Google cloud data centers and the stability rate and service performance is excellent most of the time• It has a special system that provides superior performance for WordPress systems, applications and databases• Technical support is excellent and handles hosting management on behalf of the client• Provides a staging service to test changes before they are published• Free website transfer service
cons: •The prices of its services are clearly high compared to its competitors•There is no domain reservation or free domain submission•The options for services are few•The control panel is simple but uncommon and requires training

description: I changed to Kinsta because I was getting frequent attacks with my previous host. Those problems have disappeared with Kinsta. The only problems I've had was when there was an upgrade. Those problems have been quickly solved with Kinsta support.
author: Jerrie B.
pros: I changed to Kinsta after having problems with a previous host. I've been very happy with my choice. The transfer was easy. I've had very few problems. When something arose, the support chat with Kinsta has been excellent. I prefer phone support. However, the 24/7 chat support with Kinsta has worked in every case.
cons: I prefer talking on the phone instead of messaging.

review_title: Great reputation, reliable managed Wordpress hosting
description: What a great experience. If you choose kinsta, your visitors will be proud of you
author: Oumarou S.
pros: If you’re looking for the best managed Wordpress hosting service, Kinsta is what you want. In addition to being lightning fast, they offer a quality service and many free tools: powerful CDN, free ssl and a last generation php
cons: If you have the money to pay for their services, kinsta is excellent, if not, this may be the only problem with them

description: Our overall experience is very satisfactory. I'm very passionate about website optimization and performance. Kinsta is, by far, the best managed hosting provider I've tried in this matter. Again, Kinsta's customer support team is the best asset this company has.
author: Jose G.
pros: Easy, great quality and good performance. It's all you need from a managed hosting provider. Kinsta has it all plus the best customer support team I've ever found.
cons: It would be awesome to have a buil-in file administrator from the Kinsta dashboard, also te ability to manage FTP users. Disk storage is very limited/expensive.

review_title: Google cloud C2 VM makes it 200% faster for wordpress sites
author: Vijay A.
pros: It uses Google Cloud platform compute optimised C2 machines which sky rocketa the speed of accessing wordpress files. -Speed -Security -Simple to use -Good customer support -based on new technology -Timely updates are some of the pros of this fantastic products. Earlier i was not so comfortable before buying but when i started using it then the experience till now is like super smooth heaven
cons: Once i thought that this should be improved then in very next update that thing was more better than what i thought. This is beauty when some company updates itself for users. Till now no issues.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Excellent - I highly recommend them for WP hosting!
author: Chris C.
pros: They offer an easy to use control panel, blazing fast WordPress hosting. Their technical support is exceptional and I highly recommend them.
cons: nothing. Their ease of use and technical support is excellent.

description: Pleasant experience with Kinsta since migrating our sites over nearly 2 years ago. We never miss out on important updates since email notifications are regularly sent to keep users informed of changes. On the instances I've reached out to support, they have been responsive and knowledgeable.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: While I am not well-versed in web development, Kinsta makes it easy to add and manage sites, view usage statistics and error logs, control DNS settings all from its platform dashboard. It also keeps your sites extremely secure with protection from Cloudflare. I also enjoy their staging site feature that allows you to test plugins or code before pushing it to the live site. Their help and resource section is also informative for providing instructions on how to complete specific tasks.
cons: Have not run into any issues while using Kinsta.

description: Depuis plus de deux années passées chez Kinsta je ne pourrais plus m'en passer, j'ai encore quelques sites (plus beaucoup) hébergés ailleurs et j'ai l'impression de retourner sur un vieux disque dur quand je dois les gérer alors que sur mes sites hébergés chez Kinsta je me sens comme avec un disque dur SSD :D
author: Didier D.
pros: De l'amélioration notable des performances de mon site, à l'excellent support très technique et très réactif. Je ne peux que conseiller Kinsta pour l'hébergement WordPress.
cons: Il me faudrait trop de temps pour trouver des inconvénients ;)

description: Como he comentado antes, si tienes dinero para invertir, usas Wordpress en la nube y gestionado, deseas rapidez, soporte profesional, estabilidad no lo dudes debes pensar en Kinsta.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Kinsta ofrece servicios de hosting gestionados súper sencillos basado en la nube. Se encargan de prácticamente todo por ti, la instalación y configuración. Son servidores son rápidos y escalables. Poseen un equipo de soporte para Wordpress muy profesional y rápido. Todo esto está claro que tiene un precio y es más caro que la media como no podía ser de otra forma.
cons: Le precio como hemos comentado antes es más elevado que la media pero ofrecen unas características que si lo necesitas y puedes pagarlo es una buena inversión. Desde luego si vas a invertir en Wordpress gestionado en la nube es una opción a tener en cuenta
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Kinsta: Power server and Power support 5 stars
description: Best server host i has ever been used and with the professionel and nice support you are in good hands.
author: jesper P.
pros: Server uptime 100% Really professionel support members 24/7 Support
cons: Nothing, everything is to perfection ..........................

review_title: Best WordPress hosting has a price
description: No matter what, the support is awesome and always helping!
author: Tarek B.
pros: Best WordPress hosting on the market. Easy to use and awesome support!
cons: It is a bit too expensive, but once you start using it, you don't want to miss Kinsta!

author: Madeline H.
pros: I am IN LOVE WITH KINSTA. I love the ease of use. I love the efficiency. I love the layout of the dashboard. I love that I can update my php whenever needed. I even love the chat box bot. I usually hate those, but the probing questions with clickable links to the knowledge base is always spot on and super informative (and it's all so well designed and pleasing to the eye to look at which motivates me to get even more done). And if I can't figure it out on my own with the knowledge base, there's always a real person who has helped in the chat box and they blow me away EVERY TIME with how quickly they can help and they've never failed me once. Really, Kinsta is a life saver when it comes to hosting for my site. 10/10 would recommend.
cons: Holy hell I don't know if there are any Cons with Kinsta. I know it can get pricey but it's also worth it in the long run for the efficiency and ease of use.

review_title: Kinsta, te hace la vida más fácil
description: Ofrece un excelente rendimiento y servicio, pero que también tiene un coste elevado. Si buscas lo mejor para tu sitio web y no te importa pagar un poco más, Kinsta es una buena opción.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Velocidad, seguridad y soporte técnico de Kinsta. Desde que uso Kinsta, mi sitio web carga más rápido, no tengo problemas de seguridad y siempre recibo una respuesta rápida y útil de su equipo de expertos. Además, me encanta que se basen en Google Cloud Platform, que tiene una infraestructura muy potente y confiable.
cons: Lo que menos me ha gustado es el precio. Kinsta no es el alojamiento más barato del mercado, y sus planes tienen algunas limitaciones en cuanto al número de visitas, el espacio de disco y el ancho de banda. A veces me gustaría tener más flexibilidad y opciones para ajustar mi plan a mis necesidades.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Great experince. It is easy to see that they are a customer-centric company.
author: Gurghian D.
pros: Easy to use, staging for development, great support
cons: None. There is nothing I can complain. They do a great job.

author: Randi J.
pros: Kinsta has been a reliable service for us for years. Any time we have issues their customer service responds immediately and is knowledgeable and helps tremendously. Seriously impressed with Kinsta.

description: I use [SENSITIVE CONTENT] hosting services to host my website. The quality of the hosting (speed and stability) is very good. As I don't have technical training in the area, the service and support help me a lot.
author: Humberto K.
pros: The support the company offers is perfect
cons: I don't know if it can be called a problem, but the price is not that cheap. Either way the support pays off.

review_title: The Best Hosting we ever had!
author: Olga L.
pros: performance and support, easy access to Admin, Dashboard, Backups and Metrics.
cons: big difference in plan cots if you need more PHP workers. Currently we have 4 PHP workers for $100/month, in order to increase to 6 PHP workers, we would have to pay at least 3 times more ($300). I wish there was a better plan for just increasing PHP workers (we do not need extra space, more sites, etc, we just need more PHP capabilities).

description: Always excellent, quick, reliable, informative, helpful and honest
author: Graham W.
pros: It's not so much about the software, which is excellent, but the support is 110%, and so fast, I never have to wait for than a minute to get a response and all the staff go well betond their range/scope to help me
cons: There are no dislikes, I do not have any issues or problems with Kinsta

author: Steve N.
pros: Kinsta is a great hosting company for WordPress. The site is fast, support is great, and having a staging site is wonderful.
cons: I don't have any complaints about Kinsta.

review_title: Land of Precision, Expert Support, World Class Hosting
author: Chevas B.
pros: Speed and security for hosting, ease of use, and just being able to instantly clear the server cache, or access some other needed tool.
cons: This is pretty minor, and rarely needed, but there's no way to customize nginx rules.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: A Reliable and Faster Premium Managed WordPress Hosting Provider
author: Bilal K.
pros: Kinsta is a leading, reliable, and faster premium managed WordPress hosting provider in the market.Kinsta uses Google Cloud infrastructure that ensures high availability and faster speed. Additionally, it has 34 global data centers, so you can choose the closest data center to your target market, which is a win-win situation.
cons: There is no phone support and free professional email accounts.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Verified Reviewer
pros: El uso es muy sencillo y la capacidad para personalizar es alta.
cons: Es un poco más caro que sus competidores, pero se nota la diferencia. Ya queda en las prioridades de cada cual.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
